sources.notes: Official Educational Round 186 editorial page; used with the provided official solution code to confirm tree DP merging and small-to-large state maintenance.

reference_candidates.notes: 洛谷题解候选来源；只有实际参考后才移动到 sources。

annotation.summary: Count valid short garland configurations on a tree with subtree-dependent constraints.
annotation.constraints: The tree is large, and each node's DP state may have variable length, so naive merging over all child-state pairs is too slow.
annotation.core_idea: Root the tree and compute a DP vector for each subtree. The state is indexed by a distance/height-like parameter and is shifted when moving through an edge. For a node, pick the child with the largest DP vector as the base and merge smaller child vectors into it, updating prefix/suffix products and local contributions. Lazy affine updates handle shifts and multiplicative factors so that each DP entry moves only through a small-to-large merge path.
annotation.complexity: O(n log n) or near-linear depending on implementation details of the vector merges.
tricks: lazy affine update on DP arrays

solution_variants.name: main
solution_variants.summary: Run DFS, keep the largest child DP vector as the base, merge smaller vectors with prefix/suffix products, and apply lazy shifts/factors.

tags.evidence: The main recurrence combines DP vectors from children in a rooted tree.
tags.description: Dynamic programming over rooted trees or tree subproblems.
tags.created_reason: Tree DP is a frequent contest technique and should be searchable directly.

tags.evidence: The implementation keeps the largest child vector and merges smaller child states into it to control total work.
DP arrays are shifted and scaled with lazy add/multiply style transformations during merges.
tags.description: Maintain an array or DP state under lazy affine transformations such as multiply/add/shift.
tags.created_reason: Lazy affine state maintenance is a reusable optimization distinct from ordinary lazy propagation.

tags.evidence: The DP counts configurations and combines independent child choices multiplicatively.
The input structure and recurrence are on a tree.
